title: Artisan of zombie weapons
description: a simple mod that adds weapons for a zombie apocalypse
body:
MADE BY SGOMBRIO125

 

 

this mod adds:

-PIPE

1. pipe                   

2. bladed pipe        

3. nunchaku pipe

4. spear pipe

5. explosive pipe

6. rough blade pipe

- BILLIARD STICK

1.billiard stick

2.Hockey bat

3.lacerator

4. manual chainsaw

5. barbarian axe

6. long pickaxe

-MACHETE

1. tanto machete

2. advanced machete

3. big machete

4. toxic machete

5. 100 machetes machete

-BASEBALL BAT

1. baseball bat

2. chained baseball bat

3. trident baseball bat

4. scythe baseball bat

5. Pan baseball bat

-KATANA

1. katana

2. divided katana

3. spiked katana

-HAMMER

1. hammer

2. heavy hammer

-SIGN

1.sign

2.spiked sign

3.sign shield

4.electric axe sign

5.last hope

-BOXING GLOVES

1.Boxing glove

2.Spiked boxing glove

-PENCIL

1.Pencil

2.Electric pencil

-WRENCH

1.Wrench

-SPECIAL WEAPONS

1. chainsaw 

2. saw cleaver 

3.chickenskalibur

-INGREDIENTS added by the mod 

1.blade

2.spikes

3.metal components

4.duct tape

-EXTRA added by the mod

1.backpack

 

In total the mod adds 40 new weapons to the game and 5 new extra elements

 

 

UPDATE 1: 

added:

-sign

-spiked sign

- sign shield

-rough blade

-spikes

removed:

-potato chips

changed recipes:

-saw cleaver

-spiked katana

-trident baseball bat

-sickle baseball bat

UPDATE 2.1:

 bug fixes 

UPDATE 3:

-added compatibility with better combat 

UPDATE 3.1:

-bug fixes-

-added actual compatibility with better combat

UPDATE 3.2:

-debuffed: 

  -boxing gloves: less damage, less attack speed

  -saw cleaver: less damage, more attack speed

UPDATE 4:

-added:

-electric axe sign

-electricution potion effect

-spiked boxing gloves

-remade textures and models:

-100 machetes machete

-boxing glove

-nunchaku pipe

-various craftings were also remade

-sign shield finally works

-bug fixes

UPDATE 5:

-added:

-billiard stick

-hockey bat

-last hope

-pencil

-electric pencil

-chickenscalibur

-metal components

-duct tape

-most of the craftings were remade

-bug fixes
